you get free strikes every odd turn. just need to tutor mouchette's rouse with the twilight memories they give you
Definitely doable
The trick is to align your burst turn with the lotan mechanic card that give you free strike
Also use mouchette's own posse or mouse posse to help with arith
You want to use as many 0 cost strike card to proc mouch's followup to clear the barrier
So basically
attack on odd turn?
Pretty much
Don't waste resource when you know you can't clear the barrier
mkay
So the first turn I just ignore and try to get exalt as fast as possible
strictly speaking, the card you get on odd turns does go into the discard pile if you don't play it, so you could theoretically let it discard if you know you won't get value from it
Yep
Also
Just don't bother about mouch's 3 cost
Id you don't have enough arith
Playing strike-> mortal blow -> strike is more arith efficient
dupe mortal if you're using thais. easy bar, maybe 2

Most people recommend Castor.
Is my team good atm? Chapter 6 rn
Use Gluttony, Emerge, and Frenzy wheels. They are great in arc 1.
Put them on Aigis and Helot.

I'd suggest switching Mouchette's SR wheel to Analysis of Death
And then running R wheels Whisper, Aged and Gluttony on Aigis and Helot 
Elevated focus can stay, but you could potentially replace it with Emerge too

Also, since you're in chapter 6, you can replace the covenants on Mouchette's teammates with Burial now
It's farmable through interlude
can check this thread for wheel recommendation

By clicking on the big purple button next to the ultra space
thanks
build a pure single realm team grants any extra effect ?

You do get extra effects if your realm is pure, which is achieved by either having 4 characters of the same realm or mixing your realm with Chaos
You can read all the details by clicking on the realm icon in the lineup menu and then clicking on each of the realms

Clementine, works at E0 and effiency improves with every following Enlightenment
BiS Shielder

Kath / Pollux

Unique Discard Team
